policy.source: Dedicated illustration generation with near-magenta matte normalized to exact #ff00ff before chroma removal.
policy.keyRule: Remove only high-red, low-green, high-blue magenta matte pixels; preserve cyan, white glow, black-blue, and dark-purple art.

15_hero_front_threat_atlas_chromakey.png.heroComposition: front three-quarter intimidation roar, generated after user feedback about side-view mouth-edge readability
